description: Conversation turns ingested BESIDE the fixture vault (AND-not-OR: second corpus). Each turn carries attachment ground truth: which vault entity the turn is about, and whether the current ingest path is EXPECTED to attach it (expect_attach=false rows are known-fragile label variants — lowercase, hyphenated, or indirect — measured honestly, not hidden).

turns.text: User: We decided to upgrade the Atlas Server to 128GB of RAM after the OOM incident.
User: Rate limiting for the Halcyon API is set to 60 requests per minute per device.
User: Mira Chen approved the dark mode palette yesterday, so dark mode ships together with the onboarding redesign.
User: the atlas-server needs a new case fan, I ordered a Noctua replacement today.
User: we should bump the postgres cluster to version 17 in the fall maintenance window.
Assistant: Noted - the Mesh VPN key rotation is moved from quarterly to monthly going forward.
User: Jonas Petrov quoted 12 hours for the connection pooling work on the database.
User: Decided the annual plan for Halcyon will cost 60 dollars, ten months worth for twelve.
User: The Backup Policy drill failed this month, the restore took 3 hours because B2 throttled us.
User: monitoring stack alert fatigue is getting bad, half the pages this week were disk noise.
User: The Ops Runbook needs a section on certificate renewal, Caddy rotated the cert silently this time.
User: We are pushing offline mode from Q3 to early Q4, the sync conflict resolution is harder than expected.
